title: Saladin becomes Ayyubid sultan
fact: Salah ad-Din Yusuf ibn Ayyub, commonly known as Saladin, was a Kurdish commander and political leader.

title: Al-Kamil becomes Ayyubid sultan
fact: Al-Malik al-Kamil Nasir ad-Din Muhammad, titled Abu al-Maʽali, was an Egyptian ruler and the fourth Ayyubid sultan of Egypt.

title: Al-Adil I becomes Ayyubid sultan
fact: Al-Adil I was the fourth Sultan of Egypt and Syria, and brother of Saladin, who founded both the Sultanate of Egypt, and the Ayyubid dynasty.

title: Al-Aziz Uthman becomes Ayyubid sultan
fact: Al-Malik Al-Aziz Uthman ibn Salah Ad-Din Yusuf was the second Ayyubid Sultan of Egypt.

title: As-Salih Najm al-din Ayyub becomes Ayyubid sultan
fact: Al-Malik as-Salih Najm al-Din Ayyub, Kunya: Abu al-Futuh, also known as al-Malik al-Salih, was the Ayyubid ruler of Egypt from 1240 to 1249.

title: Al-Muazzam Turanshah becomes Ayyubid sultan
fact: Turanshah, also Turan Shah,, was a ruler of Egypt, a son of Sultan As-Salih Ayyub.

title: Al-Mansur Nasir al-Din Muhammad becomes Ayyubid sultan
fact: Al-Mansur Nasir al-Din Muhammad was the third Ayyubid Sultan of Egypt, reigning in 1198–1200.

title: Al-Adil II becomes Ayyubid sultan
fact: Al-Malik al-ʿĀdil Sayf ad-Dīn Abū Bakr ibn Nāṣir ad-Dīn Muḥammad was the Ayyubid Sultan of Egypt from 1238 to 1240.
